title: La Paz, LP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to La Paz, LP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

La Paz is a city in LP with a population of 789,541. The administrative capital of Bolivia, set in a dramatic canyon landscape with the world’s highest cable car system and vibrant indigenous markets.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
